name: 身份逆襲（宮女變太子妃）
name_en: Ultimate identity ascension (maid to princess consort)
description: 皇帝親自為女主更換身份，從青樓女子變為官家小姐，正式賜婚太子。這是全劇最大的身份翻轉，觀眾看著女主從被人鄙視的最底層一路走到名正言順的太子妃位置，滿足了灰姑娘式的終極幻想。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: The Cortisan from Ronville is dead. She is now the daughter of Emory Niles, the Ministry of Revenue. As a girl from an official family, she may enter the Eastern Palace as the princess consort. ... I don't have to face the end. I really don't have to face the end.
